name: Custom Score
summary: Builds a composite score by combining multiple sub-algorithm outputs on shared SubIDs.
description:
### What it does
Combines multiple sub-algorithm scores into one composite score.

### How it works
- Compose one or more sub-algorithms; the user list is shared across them.
- Normalize the sub-algorithm scores before combining them.
- Apply the configured strategy when a SubID is missing from one or more sub-algorithm outputs.
- Join results directly on `did`.

### Output
- CSV file with `did` and `composite_score`.
- JSON file with composite score details for each SubID.

inputs.label: Sub-Algorithms
inputs.description: Compose the sub-algorithms that should contribute to the final composite score.

inputs.label: Normalization Method
inputs.description: Normalization method applied to each sub-algorithm score before combining.

inputs.label: Missing Score Strategy
inputs.description: How missing sub-algorithm scores should be handled when building the composite score.

outputs.label: Composite Score (CSV)
outputs.description: CSV file with one row per SubID and the final composite score.

columns.description: SubID from the uploaded JSON input.
Final composite score for the SubID.

outputs.label: Composite Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: JSON file with normalization and combination details for each scored SubID.
